message:
fix: guard against nil Execution in GetExecWrapper error path

If a plugin has no [execution] section, p.Execution is nil. The error
message in GetExecWrapper accessed p.Execution.Type without a nil check,
causing a panic. Now safely reports "none" when Execution is nil.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
